title: NIT Silchar MBA Admission 2026: Dates, Eligibility, Application Form & Links

detail.title: NIT Silchar MBA Admission 2026: Dates, Eligibility, Application Form & Links
detail.short_info: Apply for NIT Silchar MBA 2026-28: Check eligibility, CAT/MAT/CMAT scores, fees, step-by-step process, brochure PDF, Google Form link & deadlines. Official NIT Silchar updates.

sections.heading: NIT Silchar MBA Admission 2026: Dates, Eligibility, Application Form & Links

content.text: NIT Silchar MBA Admission 2026 is now open for the 2026-28 batch through the Department of Management Studies (DoMS), with applications accepted via a Google Form and supporting brochure.
NIT Silchar's MBA program builds core management skills in year one before dual specializations.​

rows: Dual: Marketing, Finance, Human Resource Management ​
CAT, MAT, or CMAT scores required
Graduation with 60% aggregate (relaxations for reserved categories) ​
Online Google Form + PDF form upload ​

content.text: Access the official brochure and form directly from NIT Silchar for detailed guidelines and annexures.​

items: Go to www.nits.ac.in and find the "MBA Admission" section under courses.​
Download the PDF: Click Here
Review sections on fees, eligibility, and category-specific annexures.​

content.text: Applicants must hold a bachelor's degree with minimum 60% marks (55% for SC/ST/PwD) from a recognized university.​

items: Valid score in CAT, MAT, or CMAT (no fixed cutoff; used for shortlisting).​
Final-year students eligible provisionally with proof of completion.​
Reservations follow Government of India norms for OBC-NCL, SC/ST, EWS, and PwD.​

content.text: The process combines a downloadable PDF form with online submission via Google Form.​

items: Download brochure and form from the official PDF link above.​
Complete the form with personal details, academics, entrance scores, and attach required annexures.​
Pay the application fee (typically INR 1,000-1,200) via bank transfer or online (details in brochure).​
Scan the filled form, certificates, photo, fee receipt, and proofs.​
Submit everything through the Google Form: Click Here

content.text: Shortlisting relies on entrance exam scores, followed by Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI).​

items: Composite score: ~70% entrance test, 20% GD/PI, 10% academics (standard for NIT Silchar).​
Merit list published online; selected candidates verify documents on campus.​

content.text: Fees are semester-wise, covering tuition and other charges; confirm latest in brochure.
Admissions started in January 2026; dates tentative—check site regularly.​

items: Apply Online: Click Here
Download Brochure: Click Here
Main Website: Click Here
MBA Page: Click Here
